title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What was that?! is this the start of armageddon or something?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look alive!! The treasure flew all over the place!! Pick it up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Daha ha!! You never miss a beat, Rayleigh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: gyaha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha Ha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's too late to throw it up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: far away in the forest... running.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: My one attack was all it took!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Not WA!!! It was all me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: A new branch of the day clan...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Such dangerous lives... Must not be set loose...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Stop it!! What're ya tryna do?!!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
